name: Get-TypeData

options.name: -TypeName
options.description: Specifies type data as an array only for the types with the specified names. By default, `Get-TypeData` gets all types in the session.

args.name: -TypeName
args.description: Specifies type data as an array only for the types with the specified names. By default, `Get-TypeData` gets all types in the session.

description: Gets the extended type data in the current session.
